message:
chore: add ubs-report.* to .gitignore

The UBS report JSON was showing as untracked on every scan run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -147,6 +147,7 @@ storage.sqlite3-*
 # UBS scan output files
 .ubs-*.json
 .ubs-*.txt
+ubs-report.*
 
 # Temporary fix scripts (agent-generated one-off patches)
 fix-*.js
